title: README: consolidate Auto mode
goal: Merge the two auto sections (the full Autonomous /mini:auto flag reference under Commands and the standalone Auto mode section) into one short 'Autonomous mode' section: what auto does (chains phases, acceptEdits with Bash still asking, stops at the done checkpoint) plus the slash-vs-CLI distinction and links to docs/interactive/auto.md and docs/non-interactive/auto.md; drop the per-flag list since it is already in docs.

steps.title: Write the consolidated Autonomous mode section
steps.detail: Replace the flag-list ### Autonomous /mini:auto block under Commands with a ~5-line summary (chains phases, acceptEdits but Bash still asks, stops at done checkpoint, slash-vs-CLI one-liner) ending with links to both docs/auto pages.

steps.title: Remove the standalone ## Auto mode section
steps.detail: Delete the duplicate section near the end (the mini auto paragraph), so auto is described in exactly one place.

steps.title: Verify links and length
steps.detail: Confirm docs/auto links resolve, no stale anchors, no double blank lines, wc -l README.md.
